mosques.name: Collingwood Islamic Center
mosques.description: Islamic center serving the Collingwood, Blue Mountain, and southern Georgian Bay area. Admin office located at 199 Campbell Street (Collingwood Common Roof/Rotary Community Hub).
mosques.accessInfo: Admin office at 199 Campbell Street, Collingwood Common Roof/Rotary Community Hub
mosques.notes: Serves Blue Mountain ski area and Georgian Bay. Nearest mosque for Wasaga Beach and Meaford travellers.
